interpretation: 8-seed scored LOWER on public (-0.00120), consistent with its slightly-lower uniform surrogate (-0.0004). Sign preserved (negative->negative), magnitude amplified ~3x. Pure seed-variance reduction did NOT help: the 4-seed ensemble already averages out seed noise, and adding 4 more seeds only pulled predictions toward the per-seed mean, which on this particular public half-set is marginally worse than the 4-seed mean.

cross_submission_lesson.conclusion: Sub-MDE uniform deltas (|Δ|<0.0007) do NOT reliably predict public sign: one flipped, one preserved. Confirms the within-noise band is genuinely uninformative for ranking candidates. Only deltas >= MDE (0.00355) on a 3-split panel should be trusted.

today_quota_slate.verdict: All 3 of today's reads (emb192, cross-cap, 8-seed) scored AT or BELOW emb128 4-seed (0.77745). emb128 4-seed remains the undisputed final #1. No validated candidate beats it.
